member.name: M:GTA.NaturalMotion.SetCharacterDampingHelper.#ctor(GTA.Ped)
member.summary:
Creates a new Instance of the SetCharacterDampingHelper for sending a SetCharacterDamping
to a given
.
member.param:
The
to send the SetCharacterDamping
to.
member.remarks: Damp out cartwheeling and somersaulting above a certain threshold.
